name: randomly-die
description: Random number generator with fast UI, dice, hex, binary and secrets
author: Tim Middleton <x@vaults.ca>

scripts.deploy: pnpm quasar build -m pwa && bash deploy.sh
scripts.android:build: CAPACITOR_BUILD=1 pnpm quasar build && pnpm exec cap sync android && node scripts/sync-android-version.js && bash scripts/fix-android-app-name.sh && cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:clean: CAPACITOR_BUILD=1 pnpm quasar build && pnpm exec cap sync android && node scripts/sync-android-version.js && bash scripts/fix-android-app-name.sh && cd android && ./gradlew clean :app:assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release: CAPACITOR_BUILD=1 pnpm quasar build && pnpm exec cap sync android && node scripts/sync-android-version.js && bash scripts/fix-android-app-name.sh && cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleRelease
scripts.android:build:release:clean: CAPACITOR_BUILD=1 pnpm quasar build && pnpm exec cap sync android && node scripts/sync-android-version.js && bash scripts/fix-android-app-name.sh && cd android && ./gradlew clean :app:assembleRelease
